Türkçe

Having command of another language other than English not only contributes to our learners’ academic and future business environments but is also crucial in enabling cross-cultural communication. The Modern Languages Department of Kadir Has University offers several additional language-learning classes, such as Arabic, German, French, Italian, Russian, Spanish, and Turkish. Our students can take these classes as part of the Elective Courses throughout their university studies.
